long_description:
FSRE observed multiple hosts going down on sao0401 caused by the issue in uplink switch port. Currently NRE team is working on it.
Jira: https://jira.softlayer.local/browse/FABREQ-75728
short_description: Multiple hosts are down/unreachable in sao0401
close_notes: Network teams have replaced the faulty switch with the local data-center team on shift. Following the hardware replacement, Fabric teams whose hosts were affected have verified the health of the host.
current_status_next_steps:
Current status: NRE team has replaced the switches and connected the cables. observed recoveries
Next steps: FSRE to reach out to respective service teams to verify the hosts.
chronology:
Timeline in UTC

Nov 30
9:50 PM FSRE received alert in #sl-unixalert channel
9:54 PM NRE team notified that the is04.sr01.sao04 is down in #sre-to-sre channel
9:58 PM Fleet Admin started looking into the alert
10:09 PM warroom created by NRE warroom-nre-inc10443177
11:17 PM started working on cables and replacement

Dec 1
12:10 AM FSRE team logged in and created https://jira.softlayer.local/browse/FABREQ-75728 (FSRE is on-call on weekends night)
12:30 AM FSRE Created an Incident INC10444225
12:33 AM NRE confirmed that the device is replaced and they are working on ports
12:36 AM NRE informed that the ports are online
12:37 AM FSRE observed recovery on all the hosts.
